Update the application to properly support user logins.  

# Requirements
## Account creation and logging in
1. Visitors to the application should have the option to create a new account or sign in using existing login and password.
2. When creating their account, users must select a unique handle/login and password.  
3. Passwords should be securely stored using industry standard best practices.
4. Users should have the option to log out once they have logged in.

## User profile
1. The front-end should add a profile page for each user account. 
2. Clicking on a user handle in the application should open that user's profile page.
3. The profile page should list the user's handle and show all of the posts created by that user.
4. When the user is viewing their own profile, they should see the option to edit or delete their past posts.
5. The profile page should provide users the option to delete their own account.  The UX should confirm deletion and warn the user before doing so.  Deleting an account should also permanently delete all of the user's posts.
